summary: Iteration 1 TitleBar crash regression is FIXED. Full previously-blocked test suite now green: backend 19/19 pytest passed (incl. new server_url normalisation tests) and frontend end-to-end flows all pass — onboarding wizard 3-step, 3-panel workspace, folder filter, video player + subtitle overlay + transcript, AI query hits opening player, settings sections, theme toggle (dark/light incl. bg #FAFAFA vs #09090B), all 6 accent swatches change --accent-500. No runtime error overlay ever appears, even when partial URLs like 'ollama.local' are entered.

integration_issues.flow: Settings > Connection server URL text input
integration_issues.issue: The <input> is controlled directly by settings.server_url and PUTs on EVERY keystroke. Because the backend normalises anything not matching http(s)://... to empty string, the field VISUALLY CLEARS after every character the user types. Practical impact: users cannot type a URL character-by-character in Settings — they must paste a complete https:// URL in one go. The onboarding wizard is unaffected because it uses local useState. Recommend either (a) debounce + only PUT on blur/enter, or (b) keep a local draft state and PUT the normalised value on commit.

passed: Backend 19/19 pytest passed (health, settings incl. url normalisation for 'notaurl'/'d'/'ollama.local', accept http(s), files, videos, subtitles, ai/query)
TitleBar no longer crashes — app renders with body class 'theme-dark dark' and background rgb(9,9,11)
Onboarding Step 0: theme dark/light toggle applies immediately (body class + bg); Emerald accent sets --accent-500 to #10B981
Onboarding Step 1 (server): validation gates Next; onboarding-test-server returns 'Reachable'
Onboarding Step 2 (video root): validation gates Finish; onboarding closes and settings persist
3-panel workspace: explorer-panel, main-panel, ai-panel all mount
Folder click filters video grid (f-root: 16 cards → f-hardware: 3 cards)
video-card-v-1 opens video-player with valid stream_url and metadata loads
player-transcript-toggle opens transcript sidebar with cues
AI query 'upgrading my PC' returns ai-hit-v-1 hit; clicking navigates to player
Settings page shows all 5 sections (connection, storage, processing, appearance, application)
Settings theme toggle switches body class theme-dark ↔ theme-light and bg between rgb(9,9,11) and rgb(250,250,250)
Settings accent swatches update --accent-500 (verified Ruby=#EF4444, Amber=#F59E0B)
Settings server test connection returns OK
Typing partial URL 'ollama.local' letter-by-letter into settings-server-url does NOT crash TitleBar or produce runtime error overlay (regression fix verified)
PUT /api/settings with 'notaurl', 'd', 'ollama.local' all normalised to '' and persisted
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsView.jsx TextInput debounce: sends PUT /api/settings on every keystroke. This hits the backend ~5-10x/sec while typing and causes the visible-empty-input bug for server_url. Add local draft state + onBlur/onEnter commit, or a 300ms debounce.
OnboardingModal.jsx applyTheme(t,a) triggers updateSettings on every swatch/theme click even before onboarding completes; harmless but noisy — could batch until finish.
TitleBar.jsx line 81-89 fix (IIFE + try/catch) is correct and defensive — good pattern.
server.py update_settings normalisation is minimal and correct; consider also validating cpu_limit (10-100), upload_limit_mbps, and frame_sampling ranges to avoid bad state.
action_items: OPTIONAL (medium): fix Settings > Connection server URL text input so users can type character-by-character. Currently the controlled binding + immediate PUT + backend normalisation clears the input on every keystroke. Same pattern is used for settings-video-root and settings-server-key but only server_url is affected because only it is normalised — video-root and key don't clear because backend accepts any string.
OPTIONAL: apply Pydantic Field(ge=..., le=...) constraints to cpu_limit, upload_limit_mbps, frame_sampling.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows pass; 1 medium UX issue in Settings text input)

seed_data_creation: none — used existing seeded mongo data (16 videos, 9 folders)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — covers health, settings CRUD + server_url normalisation, files/folders/videos, subtitles, ai/query, server/test. Rerun with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. The one open issue is the SettingsView text input UX: fix would be adding a local draft/debounce in TextInput or SettingsView. Onboarding will re-appear whenever onboarding_complete is reset to false on backend.
